name: Chicken Salad Wraps
recipeIngredient: 2 cups deli chicken salad or seafood salad
8 slices American cheese, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread warm tortilla with 1/2 cup chicken salad.
Layer with 1/4 tomato, 1/4 cheese, and 2 lettuce leaves.
2. Fold two opposite edges of the tortilla toward the center over the filling.
Roll up the open end of the tortilla toward the opposite edge.
Repeat with remaining tortillas.
Makes 4 sandwiches.
Each sandwich: 600 calories; 39g fat.
